buttons.name: MSI Utility V3
buttons.tooltip: A powerful tool that helps reduce latency and improve system responsiveness by optimizing how your hardware talks to Windows.
buttons.tooltipFr: Un outil puissant qui réduit la latence et améliore la réactivité du système en optimisant la communication matériel-Windows.

buttons.tooltip: Control system timer resolution for better performance

buttons.tooltipFr: Libérer de la RAM et améliorer les performances système

buttons.tooltip: Manage Hyper-V settings (Valorant, FaceIt and other kernel-level anti-cheats will no longer work with Hyper-V cut)
